action_set_definitions.name: get_victim_info
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current health status, location, and survivability time limit for a specific subject.

victim_id.description: The name or ID of the subject (e.g., 'Bravo').

action_set_definitions.name: get_environmental_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current mission time elapsed and real-time weather safety conditions.

action_set_definitions.name: get_resource_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the availability of medical and extraction supplies at the base station.

action_set_definitions.name: get_drone_fleet_status
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a list of all active UAVs, their types (e.g., heavy-lift), battery levels, and current coordinates.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_medical_supply
action_set_definitions.description: Applies a specific resource to a subject to stabilize their health.

resource_type.description: The type of resource to apply.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_extraction
action_set_definitions.description: Initiates the transport of a subject to the base station using a specified method and asset.

asset_id.description: The specific drone ID (if aerial) or team ID (if litter-carry) performing the action.

state_description.mission_time_elapsed: Total minutes passed since the start of the mission.
state_description.drone_fleet: List of active UAVs with their current coordinates, battery levels, and cargo status.
state_description.victim_registry: Information regarding detected and suspected victim locations and health status.
state_description.resource_inventory: Supplies available at the base station.
